A.does: Processes all pending state updates in a fiber's update queue, computing the resulting new state (and tracking whether any ForceUpdate was encountered) during the render phase of a fiber.

B.does: Initializes a fresh work-in-progress fiber tree from the root and resets global work-loop state, setting up the render environment before a new render pass begins.

comparison: prepareFreshStack is called once at the start of a render pass (work-loop level) to set up the root work-in-progress tree, while processUpdateQueue is called per-fiber during beginWork to apply that fiber's queued state updates.
